##NAMES=Kamphaugite-(Y)
##RRUFFID=R080085
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=CaY(CO_3_)_2_(OH)·H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Ashland, Massachusetts, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Peter Cristofono
##DESCRIPTION=Spherical clusters of peach colored radiating crystals, associated with colorless calcite and prismatic laumonite. The orange spheres are a mixture of stellerite and a thin coating, assumed to be the kamphaugite-(Y), that we cannot confirm (amorphous).
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is not yet confirmed
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R080085
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
